name: io.kynara/mcp-gateway
description: Authorization and policy enforcement gateway for MCP servers. Adds RBAC + ABAC checks, human-in-the-loop approvals, least-privilege tool discovery, and a tamper-evident audit log to any upstream MCP server — per agent, with zero agent-side changes.

environmentVariables.name: KYNARA_UPSTREAM_MCP_URL
environmentVariables.description: Upstream MCP server URL to front (SSE).

environmentVariables.name: KYNARA_MCP_SERVER_ID
environmentVariables.description: Server id from the Kynara MCP Gateway page; enables central tool->scope mapping and least-privilege filtering.

environmentVariables.name: KYNARA_FAIL_OPEN
environmentVariables.description: Fallback when Kynara is unreachable; false = fail-closed (default).
